zh.lifeSummary: 當Idonia de Veteripont於大約1262年出生時，她的父親Robert de Veteripont31歲，母親Isabel FitzJohn31歲。她於1302年6月25日之前與John de Cromwell在艾歐洛結婚。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Idonia de Veteripont was born about 1262, her father, Robert de Veteripont, was 31 and her mother, Isabel FitzJohn, was 31. She married John de Cromwell before 25 June 1302, in Europe.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Idonia de Veteripont est née environ 1262, son père, Robert de Veteripont, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzJohn, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John de Cromwell avant 25 juin 1302, à Europe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Idonia de Veteripont um 1262 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Veteripont 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel FitzJohn 31. Sie hat vor 25. Juni 1302 in Europa John de Cromwell geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Idonia de Veteripont è nata il circa 1262, sua padre, Robert de Veteripont, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel FitzJohn, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John de Cromwell prima del 25 giugno 1302, nel Europa.

ko.lifeSummary: Idonia de Veteripont(이)가 대략 1262년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Veteripont(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzJohn(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1302년 6월 25일 이전 우럽에서 John de Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Idonia de Veteripont nasceu aproximadamente 1262, seu pai, Robert de Veteripont, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel FitzJohn, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Cromwell antes 25 de junho de 1302, em Europa.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Idonia de Veteripont родилась около 1262 г., её отцу по имени Robert de Veteripont было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzJohn, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Cromwell перед 25 июнь 1302 г. в местности Европа.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Idonia de Veteripont nació aproximadamente 1262, su papá, Robert de Veteripont, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel FitzJohn, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John de Cromwell antes de 25 de junio de 1302, en Europa.
